survivaltweaks.profile.title: Profiles
survivaltweaks.profile.name: Profile Name
survivaltweaks.profile.message.default_m: Choose another profile to make it default first
survivaltweaks.profile.message.server_bl: Enter or select a server address
survivaltweaks.chat.first-time: §6Thank you for using Survival Tweaks, §rYou can open the menu by pressing §a[%s§a] §rand toggle scanning with §a[%s§a]§r.
survivaltweaks.chat.first-time-line-2: These can be changed in settings -> options -> controls -> keybindings. §cThis message will only show once.
survivaltweaks.message.missing_input: You need to have all the inputs filled in
survivaltweaks.message.already_exists: This block has already been added to the block list
survivaltweaks.message.block_exists: %s already exists. Please enter a different name.
survivaltweaks.message.unknown: Looks like the block you've tried to edit doesn't exist.
survivaltweaks.message.config_missing: Config file not found. Creating now.
survivaltweaks.message.thats_odd: Something went wrong? Sorry about that. Make an issue if this continues to happen
survivaltweaks.message.nothing_infront: You're not looking at anything are you?
survivaltweaks.message.not_a_number: {%s} is not a number. Please use a number for your meta
survivaltweaks.message.meta_not_supporte: {%s} isn't a valid meta data for {%s}
survivaltweaks.message.state_warning:
Warning, this will limit you to default
blocks. Use looking at or in hand to get
the absolute block you require.
In some cases (chests) this may be what you need to do
if that's the case then this is the right option.
survivaltweaks.tooltips.add_block:
Select a block to add to the scanned blocks
This uses block defaults, if you require a specific block
then use 'Add Looking At'.
survivaltweaks.tooltips.add_block_in_han:
Automatically selects the block you've
got in your hand to add to the list.
survivaltweaks.tooltips.add_block_lookin:
Automatically selects the block you're
looking at to add to the list.
survivaltweaks.tooltips.show_lava:
Displays lava in RED like a normal block.
Watch out! It's hot.
survivaltweaks.tooltips.distance: Warning: Larger radius will lag for a second whilst updating.
survivaltweaks.tooltips.profile: Manage scan profiles and server activation rules.
survivaltweaks.tooltips.edit2: Hold shift and click to edit.
survivaltweaks.message.help.gui:
To edit a block simply shift click on the block you wish to edit.
If you want to enable / disable a block then click on a block
 and it'll toggle on and off.
survivaltweaks.message.help.warning:
As a warning, using any distance over 64 will cause FPS drops due
to the vast amount of blocks that we have to scan. (It's like 256^3)
